Title: History
SoftwareDev-Description: I studied Software Development at ROC van Twente, where I learned programming fundamentals, database management, and web development using technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP.
CrossmediaHouse-Description: Crossmedia House is an online marketing agency that maintains websites and webshops using WordPress.
CrossmediaHouse-Work-Description: During my internship at Crossmedia House, I assisted in developing and maintaining client websites using WordPress and its plugin WooCommerce.
CompadSoftware-Description: Compad Software is a software company with the goal of developing industry-specific software, where service and customer orientation are high in the agenda.
CompadSoftware-Work-Description: During my internship at Compad Software, I worked with the development team on the new project. During the internship, I worked on a number of tasks, including creating UI components with both .NET MAUI and React. I also worked with my lead developer on integrating payment processing into the API using the Pay.nl payment service API.
